summary: Exceptionally clear and balanced recording, hailed as one of the best‑sounding on the Archive.
review: The sole review praises this tape for its superb audio fidelity, calling it one of the best‑sounding recordings in the collection. No comments were made about the musical performance or setlist, so the show quality cannot be assessed from the available feedback.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review highlights outstanding recording quality but provides no information on the performance, so the rating reflects excellent sound with an unknown show component.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes it as one of the best‑sounding recordings on the Archive – implying very clear, crisp, and well‑balanced audio.
